STIPULATION AND ORDER STIPULATION FOR STAY OF JUDGMENT & ORDER THEREON IN CONSIDERATION OF DEFS. PAYING PL. $475 EVICTION AT 540 25TH AVE, S.F, CA. STAYED UNTIL 12-15-93. POPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES AFTER 5PM, 12-11-93 DEEMED ABANDONED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, MARIE KWOK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, CHOO UNG LEE, YOUNG SOOK $3,080.00 RENT, $222.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,302.00
